name: Teton Stage Lines School Bus
recent_news: Family-owned since 1994 when Donavan and Jackie Harrington purchased from the Ashcraft family; second generation (Nathan Harrington) involved in management.
fit_notes: Small but legitimate independent family operator with 14-bus school route business plus charter — modest tuck-in scale for Summit but in-footprint (ID); second-gen Harrington presence suggests succession is medium-term, not imminent.

name: Holcomb Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No web footprint found for a Holcomb Bus operation at 450 Thelma St, Hudson, IA. The 'holcombbus.com' domain and Holcomb Bus Service Inc (USDOT 279612, 375 power units, 350 drivers) is the well-known NJ-based Holcomb family business in Bellmawr, NJ — not Iowa. Hudson Community School District (IA) shows no public reference to a Holcomb contractor.
fit_notes: Likely a data-quality error in the source list — the Iowa address does not match any verifiable operating school-bus contractor. Recommend de-prioritize until address/entity can be reconciled (possible duplicate of NJ Holcomb or a defunct local operator).

name: Bernhard Bus Svc
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint for 'Bernhard Bus Svc' in Westport, CT. The source record's lead_exec field appears garbled ('Owner Bernhard Bus Svc') and the listed website 'Bluesy.Com' is not a bus company. Westport Public Schools currently contracts with First Student, not a Bernhard entity. 'Bernard Bus Service' exists but is in Chatfield, MN — different company.
website: unverified (Bluesy.com is not a bus company)
fit_notes: Almost certainly a data-quality artifact (parse error / non-operator / possibly defunct). Not a credible tuck-in target without further entity verification.

name: Brown Transportation
owner_or_parent: independent (Dale Brown, Inc. / Glenda Brown CEO per third-party)
service_types: possible bus driver employment per LinkedIn
recent_news: Brown Transportation at 98 Intervale St, Dorchester MA is classified as Transportation/Trucking/Railroad - Freight Delivery on LinkedIn (51-200 employees, ~68 profiles). Browntransportation.com domain actually serves a different Brown Transportation (Dale Brown, Inc., aggregate hauler, Oklahoma/Texas). No evidence the Dorchester entity is a yellow-bus school contractor; could be a small private/SPED/van transport operator but not confirmed.
website: unconfirmed (browntransportation.com belongs to OK aggregate hauler; Dorchester entity has LinkedIn only)
fit_notes: Likely mis-tagged as school bus in source list — the .com is an unrelated OK aggregate hauler and the Dorchester entity classifies as freight. If it actually does run SPED/van service for BPS/charter schools it could be small in-footprint, but ownership/scope must be re-verified before treating as a target.

name: Union Street Bus
owner_or_parent: Southeastern Regional Transit Authority (SRTA) contractor / public transit operation
recent_news: Union Street Bus Company Inc was the operating contractor for SRTA's New Bedford public-transit fixed routes and ADA demand-response paratransit (documented in FTA/NLRB filings c.2009-2011). 65 Potomska St is the SRTA New Bedford bus operations facility, not a private yellow-bus depot. Listed website srtabus.com is the SRTA public transit authority site.
website: https://www.srtabus.com (SRTA, not a private school bus operator)
fit_notes: Not a target — this is a public-transit operating contract (SRTA), not an independent private school-bus operator. Should be removed from tuck-in pipeline.
